# AI OS Recommendations — ai-os

> Auto-generated by AI OS based on detected stack. Refreshed on every `--refresh-existing` run.

## Lifecycle Orchestration (Define → Plan → Build → Verify → Review → Ship)

AI OS embeds slash-command prompts for each lifecycle phase. Use them in order:

| Phase | Prompt | Purpose |
| ----- | ------ | ------- |
| Define | `/define` | Structure feature intent, scope, constraints, and success criteria |
| Plan | `/plan` | Break the feature into ordered, dependency-aware implementation tasks |
| Build | `/build` | Execute one task at a time with minimal, convention-compliant changes |
| Verify | `/verify` | Check implementation against success criteria and run tests |
| Review | `/review` | Severity-tagged code review (Critical → Required → Optional → FYI) |
| Ship | `/ship` | Pre-ship checklist — tests, secrets scan, changelog, version bump |

> These prompts are available as VS Code Copilot slash commands via `.github/copilot/prompts.json`.

## Recommended VS Code Extensions

- [`ms-vscode.vscode-typescript-next`](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ms-vscode.vscode-typescript-next) — for `TypeScript`

**Install all at once:**
```bash
code --install-extension ms-vscode.vscode-typescript-next
```

## Universal Skills (Optional)

> These skills are generally useful but not specific to your stack.

- **find-skills**
- **context7**

**Install via skills CLI:**
```bash
npx -y skills add --skill find-skills -g -a github-copilot
npx -y skills add --skill context7 -g -a github-copilot
```
